headline.text: L3 Matrix fought weight and scale faults *all day* — maintenance on-site at window close, buckets opening mid-cycle.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 S2 completed a 2-hour reheat and restarted at 11:45 after enrober buildup. S3 cleared forming-plate blowoffs with a position adjustment but still has trough buildup that will need a reheat soon. S4 ran clean.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML2 lost the Z conveyor at 16:49 when a roller key slot failed — maintenance installed a temporary key and line restarted by 17:19. ML3 fought high scrap at shift start from twin-belt tension, cleared by 20:22. FFS completed a 4-hour changeover to 12-count with a temp alarm reset, back online at 04:32.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 Matrix struggled with Yamato weight faults from 11:06 through window close — buckets opening prematurely, affecting bag weight. Rejector belt reported shaking at 16:56 with no follow-up. ML1 cleared a glycol hose break and a south-chain derail, both inside 2 hours. Truffle line reports tunnel 3 belt is breaking but not yet affecting product. ML4 clean found depositor 4 nozzle plate still had chocolate inside at 06:37.

notes.text: Grey Boscan flagged a training incident on ML1 at 07:14 — operator in training used wrong temper sheet for product, made unnecessary mixer water adjustment.
ML4 team could not locate TG3 chain after wash; confirmed maintenance had already started small-bar changeover, longer chain installed.
Troy Baxter created new X-ray recipe for FFS and slowed check weigher from 60 to 55 — first and second shift both hit attainment for the first time this week.

resolved.title: S2 enrober reheat for buildup
resolved.summary: Enrober trough buildup required full reheat and chocolate removal; caramel stopped at Conbar.
resolved.resolution: Reheat completed by 10:20, caramel cooked, line restarted at 11:45 — total 2 hours 15 minutes downtime (Dakota Adair, Joseph Scott).

resolved.title: S3 forming-plate blowoffs
resolved.summary: High blowoff rate at forming plates during pretzel run.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance adjusted product position setting from 9.0 to 5.0 at 17:30 — "it is running better" (Mathew Draper).

resolved.title: ML2 Z conveyor roller key failure
resolved.summary: Z conveyor stopped when key slot on roller broke; line down, weights moved to manual scale.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance installed new key as temporary fix by 18:37 — "it's running good" (Raymond Fleming). Line restarted at 17:19.

resolved.title: ML3 twin-belt tension caused high scrap
resolved.summary: First blowoff before forming plate rejecting heavily; twin white belts out of tension, roller and chain also needed adjustment.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance adjusted tension, replaced roller underneath twin belts, adjusted chain by 20:16 — "line is working way better" at 20:22 (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: FFS changeover with temp alarm
resolved.summary: 5 oz to 12-count changeover extended by password issues and temp-out-of-range alarm requiring hard reset.
resolved.resolution: Changeover completed, hard reset cleared temp alarm, line running at 04:32 — "Line is up and running" (VFFS).

resolved.title: ML1 south chain derailed, molds ejecting
resolved.summary: South chain dislocated or loosened, causing molds to fall off pins during run.
resolved.resolution: Maintenance fixed chain issue by 18:44 — "Line is running moving now" (Nathan Gevenois at 18:46).

resolved.title: C6 conveyor glycol hose ruptured
resolved.summary: Conveyor belt rubbed against glycol hose on Cavanna machine and broke it; maintenance replaced and line cleared.
resolved.resolution: Hose replaced, line running by 14:47 — "Imperial, metal detector and c6 belt are running well" (Imperial).

resolved.title: ML1 piston fault alarm
resolved.summary: Right-side piston alarm triggered, line stopped briefly.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 19:14 — "The right sided started working again. We are now running" (Imperial).

resolved.title: Matrix pallet stability on BEQ changeover
resolved.summary: New Bequet 17.1 oz palletization pattern per spec caused instability; floor proposed alternate stack.
resolved.resolution: Bequet approved floor's alternate stacking at 11:56 — "we are ok to proceed with your solution" (Ira Robison). Final pallet approved at 12:30 (Jenny Medina).

resolved.title: Truffle metal detector sensitivity high
resolved.summary: Metal detector dropping too many rows; maintenance fine-tuned to reduce false rejects.
resolved.resolution: Tuned at 12:59 — eliminated one row from dropping, now Brass/SS316 drop 7 rows, Ferrous 9 rows vs. 8 and 10 before (Preston Elmer).

needs_attention.title: S3 enrober trough buildup needs reheat
needs_attention.summary: Significant chocolate buildup in enrober trough and thin bottomer coverage indicate reheat needed, but 3rd shift only scheduled 4 hours so team delaying.
needs_attention.status: Buildup confirmed at 16:07 and 21:01, preventing optimal coating; reheat deferred due to short shift, no ETA for resolution.

needs_attention.title: Matrix Yamato weight faults all day
needs_attention.summary: Yamato scale buckets opening prematurely, causing bag weight errors; maintenance adjusted program, vibration, and bag target multiple times without resolving root cause.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance on-site at 07:05 window close, still troubleshooting bucket actuation after adjustments at 11:06, 14:03, and 14:18 failed to hold.

needs_attention.title: Matrix rejector belt shaking strongly
needs_attention.summary: Rejector belt vibrating heavily, maintenance notified.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 16:56, no follow-up posted by window close.

needs_attention.title: Truffle tunnel 3 belt breaking
needs_attention.summary: Cooling tunnel 3 belt is tearing but not yet affecting product quality; QA and supervisors notified.
needs_attention.status: Belt breaking as of 18:30, monitored through window close, no replacement scheduled yet.

needs_attention.title: ML4 depositor 4 nozzle plate incomplete clean
needs_attention.summary: Nozzle plate was not fully disassembled during level-3 clean and still has chocolate inside.
needs_attention.status: Identified at 06:37, 3rd shift operator tasked to disassemble and re-clean.

needs_attention.title: Truffle line checklist missing
needs_attention.summary: First-shift operators cannot locate the line checklist at shift start.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 05:49, no resolution posted by window close.
